title: Rattle Document (Offer/Datasheet/Quote) Template
description: Output of the rattle-document-templates workflow. Describes a document template with chapters and attachments. Honours the doc_type contract from GET /documents/doc-types.

doc_type.description: Must match an existing doc_type key from GET /documents/doc-types (e.g. 'offer', 'datasheet', 'quote').

slug.description: Unique within the template. Lowercase kebab-case.

content_block_id.description: Existing content block id. Use this for system dynamic blocks (look up by key via GET /documents/content-blocks?is_dynamic=true).

dynamic_key.description: Convenience: 'dynamic:document_configuration' etc. The builder resolves this to a content_block_id at execution time.

content_block_proposal.description: Used only when proposing a NEW static content block (not a wrapper around a dynamic key — that violates use-system-dynamic-blocks).
